property.label: Embed Type
property.name: embedType
property.datasource: Spotter, Search, Answer, Liveboard, Full App

property.name: tsURL
property.label: ThoughtSpot URL
property.description: The full URL to your ThoughtSpot host

property.name: orgID
property.label: ThoughtSpot Org ID
property.description: ThoughtSpot Organization Identifier — leave blank if not using orgs

property.name: liveboardId
property.label: [Liveboard] Liveboard ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Liveboard to embed

property.name: tsObjectTabid
property.label: [Liveboard] Tab ID
property.description: Open the Liveboard on a specific tab — leave blank for the default tab

property.name: vizId
property.label: [Liveboard] Viz ID
property.description: Embed a single visualization instead of the full Liveboard — leave blank for the full Liveboard

property.name: searchDataSource
property.label: [Search] Data Source ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Worksheet or Model to search against

property.name: answerId
property.label: [Answer] Saved Answer ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot saved Answer to embed

property.name: worksheetId
property.label: [Spotter] Worksheet / Model ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Worksheet or Model that Spotter will query against

property.name: spotterHideSourceSelection
property.label: [Spotter] Hide data source selector?
property.description: Completely hides the data source picker from the Spotter UI

property.name: spotterDisableSourceSelection
property.label: [Spotter] Disable data source selector?
property.description: Grays out the data source picker — keeps it visible but non-interactive

property.name: spotterHideCardBranding
property.label: [Spotter] Hide ThoughtSpot branding on response cards?
property.description: Removes the ThoughtSpot logo from AI-generated response cards

property.name: spotterCardBrandingLabel
property.label: [Spotter] Response card label
property.description: Custom label shown on AI-generated response cards — leave blank to show no label

property.name: spotterFileUpload
property.label: [Spotter] Enable file upload?
property.description: Shows a file upload button in the Spotter chat input

property.name: fullAppPageId
property.label: [Full App] Landing Page
property.datasource: Page.Home, Page.Liveboards, Page.Search, Page.Data, Page.Answers, Page.SpotIQ, Page.Monitor
property.description: The ThoughtSpot page to open when the Full App embed loads

property.name: hideModuleTrending
property.label: [Full App] Hide Trending section?
property.description: Hides the Trending Liveboards and Answers panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleWatchlist
property.label: [Full App] Hide Watchlist section?
property.description: Hides the KPI Watchlist panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleFavorite
property.label: [Full App] Hide Favorites section?
property.description: Hides the Favorites panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleMyLibrary
property.label: [Full App] Hide Library section?
property.description: Hides the Library (Answers and Liveboards list) from the home page

property.name: hideModuleSearch
property.label: [Full App] Hide Search module?
property.description: Hides the search bar module from the home page

property.name: hideModuleLearning
property.label: [Full App] Hide Learning section?
property.description: Hides the Learning videos and resources panel from the home page

property.name: tsObjectGuid
property.label: [Deprecated] Object GUID
property.description: Deprecated — use the type-specific ID field for your embed type above. Kept for backwards compatibility with existing page configurations.

property.name: filterOnRecordId
property.label: Simple filter: filter content based on the current record
property.description: When enabled, the current record ID is passed to ThoughtSpot as a runtime filter on the column set in 'ThoughtSpot Column Name'.

property.name: tsColumnName
property.label: ThoughtSpot Column Name
property.description: The ThoughtSpot column name to filter on. Must match a column in your Liveboard or Answer. Used by both simple and advanced filtering.

property.name: sfFieldName
property.label: Advanced filter: Salesforce field to use as filter value
property.description: Select a field from the current record. Its value will be passed to ThoughtSpot as the filter value for the column set in 'ThoughtSpot Column Name'. Leave blank when using simple record ID filtering.

property.label: Embed Type
property.name: embedType
property.datasource: Spotter, Search, Answer, Liveboard, Full App

property.name: tsURL
property.label: ThoughtSpot URL
property.description: The full URL to your ThoughtSpot host

property.name: orgID
property.label: ThoughtSpot Org ID
property.description: ThoughtSpot Organization Identifier — leave blank if not using orgs

property.name: liveboardId
property.label: [Liveboard] Liveboard ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Liveboard to embed

property.name: tsObjectTabid
property.label: [Liveboard] Tab ID
property.description: Open the Liveboard on a specific tab — leave blank for the default tab

property.name: vizId
property.label: [Liveboard] Viz ID
property.description: Embed a single visualization instead of the full Liveboard — leave blank for the full Liveboard

property.name: searchDataSource
property.label: [Search] Data Source ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Worksheet or Model to search against

property.name: answerId
property.label: [Answer] Saved Answer ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot saved Answer to embed

property.name: worksheetId
property.label: [Spotter] Worksheet / Model ID
property.description: GUID of the ThoughtSpot Worksheet or Model that Spotter will query against

property.name: spotterHideSourceSelection
property.label: [Spotter] Hide data source selector?
property.description: Completely hides the data source picker from the Spotter UI

property.name: spotterDisableSourceSelection
property.label: [Spotter] Disable data source selector?
property.description: Grays out the data source picker — keeps it visible but non-interactive

property.name: spotterHideCardBranding
property.label: [Spotter] Hide ThoughtSpot branding on response cards?
property.description: Removes the ThoughtSpot logo from AI-generated response cards

property.name: spotterCardBrandingLabel
property.label: [Spotter] Response card label
property.description: Custom label shown on AI-generated response cards — leave blank to show no label

property.name: spotterFileUpload
property.label: [Spotter] Enable file upload?
property.description: Shows a file upload button in the Spotter chat input

property.name: fullAppPageId
property.label: [Full App] Landing Page
property.datasource: Page.Home, Page.Liveboards, Page.Search, Page.Data, Page.Answers, Page.SpotIQ, Page.Monitor
property.description: The ThoughtSpot page to open when the Full App embed loads

property.name: hideModuleTrending
property.label: [Full App] Hide Trending section?
property.description: Hides the Trending Liveboards and Answers panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleWatchlist
property.label: [Full App] Hide Watchlist section?
property.description: Hides the KPI Watchlist panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleFavorite
property.label: [Full App] Hide Favorites section?
property.description: Hides the Favorites panel from the home page

property.name: hideModuleMyLibrary
property.label: [Full App] Hide Library section?
property.description: Hides the Library (Answers and Liveboards list) from the home page

property.name: hideModuleSearch
property.label: [Full App] Hide Search module?
property.description: Hides the search bar module from the home page

property.name: hideModuleLearning
property.label: [Full App] Hide Learning section?
property.description: Hides the Learning videos and resources panel from the home page

property.name: tsObjectGuid
property.label: [Deprecated] Object GUID
property.description: Deprecated — use the type-specific ID field for your embed type above. Kept for backwards compatibility with existing page configurations.
